notes.text:
SINEC NMS before V4.0 SP3 contains an Authorization Bypass vulnerability that could allow an attacker to bypass authorization checks, leading to the ability to reset the password of any arbitrary user account.

Siemens has released a new version for SINEC NMS and recommends to update to the latest version.
notes.title: Summary

notes.text:
As a general security measure, Siemens strongly recommends to protect network access to devices with appropriate mechanisms. In order to operate the devices in a protected IT environment, Siemens recommends to configure the environment according to Siemens' operational guidelines for Industrial Security (Download: https://www.siemens.com/cert/operational-guidelines-industrial-security), and to follow the recommendations in the product manuals.
Additional information on Industrial Security by Siemens can be found at: https://www.siemens.com/industrialsecurity
notes.title: General Recommendations

notes.text: For further inquiries on security vulnerabilities in Siemens products and solutions, please contact the Siemens ProductCERT: https://www.siemens.com/cert/advisories
notes.title: Additional Resources

notes.text: The use of Siemens Security Advisories is subject to the terms and conditions listed on: https://www.siemens.com/productcert/terms-of-use.
notes.title: Terms of Use

references.summary: SSA-605717: Authorization Bypass Vulnerability in SINEC NMS Before V4.0 SP3 - HTML Version
SSA-605717: Authorization Bypass Vulnerability in SINEC NMS Before V4.0 SP3 - CSAF Version

document.title: SSA-605717: Authorization Bypass Vulnerability in SINEC NMS Before V4.0 SP3

notes.text: Affected products do not properly validate user authorization when processing password reset requests. This could allow an authenticated remote attacker to bypass authorization checks, leading to the ability to reset the password of any arbitrary user account.
notes.title: Summary

remediations.details: Limit network access to trusted users and systems only
Update to V4.0 SP3 or later version
